headline: Coinbase lays off 14% of workforce, CEO explains AI pivot in memo
summary: Cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase Global (COIN) will be cutting 14% of its workforce, according to a new memo out from founder-CEO Brian Armstrong. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland dive into Armstrong's memo and the shift toward making the company more "AI-native." Coinbase is currently scheduled to release first quarter earnings results this Thursday, May 7.
